_comment: VENDOR PROFILE TEMPLATE — Copy this file and fill in for each CMMS platform.

_instructions.field_aliases: Map vendor field names → our canonical field names (before classification)
_instructions.nested_paths: Extract fields from nested objects/arrays using dot-bracket notation
_instructions.custom_fields_discovery: Optional: how to discover custom fields for this vendor
_instructions.default_strategies: Default strategy per canonical field (map/context/ignore) — overridable by control_table.csv

_nested_path_syntax.array_wildcard: WorkTasks[*].tradeCode → joins all values with comma
_nested_path_syntax.custom_fields_auto: If a field named 'customFields' is an array of {name,value} objects, auto-flattens into name:value pairs
